title: Build a container image
description: Builds a container image with Docker or Podman, with buildx-powered multi-platform builds, secrets, and metadata/tag generation. Experimental: breaking changes may occur and not adhere to semver versioning.

engine.description: The container engine to use to build the image.

quiet.description: Suppress verbose output from the underlying engine (version/info banners).

context.description: Build context: the set of files located at the specified PATH.

file.description: Path to the Dockerfile/Containerfile. Defaults to `Dockerfile` in the project root.

allow.description: Extra privileged entitlements (e.g. `network.host`, `security.insecure`). Docker engine only.

build-contexts.description: Additional named build contexts, e.g. `name=path`. Requires buildx >=0.8.0 (Docker) or podman >=4.2.0.

builder.description: Name of an existing buildx builder instance to use. Docker engine only.

create-builder.description: Create a temporary buildx builder instance for this build and remove it afterwards. Docker engine only.

cgroup-parent.description: Optional parent cgroup for the build container.

load.description: Load the built image into the local engine after building (shorthand for `--output=type=docker`).

network.description: Networking mode for RUN instructions during the build.

no-cache.description: Do not use cache when building the image.

no-cache-filters.description: Stages to exclude from the build cache. Docker engine only.

platforms.description: Target platforms for the build, e.g. `linux/amd64`, `linux/arm64`.

provenance.description: Provenance attestation mode, e.g. `true`, `false`, or `mode=max`. Docker engine only.

pull.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the base image.

push.description: Push the built image after building (shorthand for `--output=type=registry` on the Docker engine; a separate `podman push` per tag on the Podman engine).

sbom.description: Generate an SBOM attestation for the build. Docker engine only.

secrets.description: Secrets to expose to the build as `key=value`, e.g. `NPM_TOKEN=${NPM_TOKEN}`. Supports `$VAR`/`${VAR}` environment variable expansion in the value.

secret-files.description: Secrets to expose to the build from files, e.g. `npmrc=./secret.txt`. Supports `$VAR`/`${VAR}` environment variable expansion in the path.

ssh.description: SSH agent sockets or keys to expose to the build.

tags.description: Explicit image tags to apply. Overridden by the tags computed from `metadata.images`, if set.

metadata.description: Dynamically compute image tags, labels, and OCI annotations from git/version context, similar to `docker/metadata-action`.

images.description: Base image names to generate tags for. Supports `name=...,enable=...` syntax.

tags.description: Tag rules, e.g. `type=schedule`, `type=semver,pattern={{version}}`, `type=ref,event=branch`, `type=sha`. Defaults to schedule + branch/tag/pr ref rules.

flavor.description: Flavor rules controlling `latest` and prefix/suffix behavior, e.g. `latest=auto`, `prefix=v,onlatest=true`.

labels.description: Custom OCI labels, merged with the auto-generated `org.opencontainers.image.*` labels.

annotations.description: Custom OCI annotations, merged the same way as labels.

sep-tags.description: Separator used when logging the generated tag list.

sep-labels.description: Separator used when logging the generated label list.

bake-target.description: Reserved for future bake-file generation parity; currently informational only.

env.description: Extra environment variables to set for the build engine's subprocess.

envFile.description: Path to a dotenv file whose variables are merged into the build engine's subprocess environment (overridden by `env`).
